summary: Completed testing of Support Analytics feature. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All analytics UI components verified - toggle button, AnalyticsPanel with charts and staff performance table.

issues: Minor: Hydration warning in console (span inside tbody) - doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/chatbot/admin/analytics requires authentication (401)
✅ Backend: GET /api/chatbot/admin/analytics requires admin role (403 for customer)
✅ Backend: analytics returns all required fields (peak_hours, avg_response_time_minutes, staff_performance, daily_tickets, status_breakdown, total_tickets, resolved_rate)
✅ Backend: peak_hours structure is correct [{hour: int, count: int}]
✅ Backend: staff_performance structure is correct [{id, name, tickets_handled, avg_rating, total_ratings}]
✅ Backend: daily_tickets structure is correct [{date: 'YYYY-MM-DD', count: int}]
✅ Backend: status_breakdown has pending/assigned/resolved counts
✅ Backend: numeric fields have correct types and ranges
✅ Backend: total_tickets matches sum of status_breakdown
✅ Backend: resolved_rate calculation is correct ((resolved/total)*100)
✅ Frontend: Admin login successful
✅ Frontend: SupportTicketsTab displays stat cards (pending, assigned, resolved, total)
✅ Frontend: 'عرض التحليلات المتقدمة' button visible and clickable
✅ Frontend: AnalyticsPanel opens with animation on button click
✅ Frontend: Analytics header 'تحليلات الدعم المتقدمة' visible
✅ Frontend: Quick stats cards show: متوسط وقت الرد, إجمالي التذاكر, معدل الحل, فريق الدعم
✅ Frontend: Peak hours chart (أوقات الذروة) displays correctly
✅ Frontend: Daily tickets chart (التذاكر اليومية - آخر 7 أيام) displays correctly
✅ Frontend: Staff performance table (أداء فريق الدعم) displays correctly
✅ Frontend: Toggle button changes to 'إخفاء التحليلات' when panel is open
critical_code_review_comments: chatbot.py /admin/analytics correctly calculates peak_hours from created_at timestamps
chatbot.py /admin/analytics correctly calculates avg_response_time from first admin reply
chatbot.py /admin/analytics aggregates staff_performance by updated_by field
chatbot.py /admin/analytics filters daily_tickets to last 7 days
chatbot.py properly protects endpoint with admin check
SupportTicketsTab.js fetchAnalytics() called on component mount
AnalyticsPanel component renders all analytics sections with proper charts
Minor: Hydration warning due to span wrapper inside tbody - consider wrapping table rows differently
seed_data_creation: Used existing support tickets data created by previous tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Support Analytics feature fully tested. Key endpoint: GET /api/chatbot/admin/analytics returns {peak_hours, avg_response_time_minutes, staff_performance, daily_tickets, status_breakdown, total_tickets, resolved_rate}. UI: SupportTicketsTab.js has toggle button 'عرض التحليلات المتقدمة' that opens AnalyticsPanel component with charts and staff table.
